# Customization Index

## Always-on

- `copilot-instructions.md`: global operating rules for SQL Server, Flyway, SSIS, Azure DevOps, and DEV/ENT/QA.

## Instructions

- `instructions/data-engineering.instructions.md`: shared workplace rules.
- `instructions/sql-server.instructions.md`: `.sql` rules.
- `instructions/flyway.instructions.md`: migration rules.
- `instructions/ssis.instructions.md`: SSIS rules.
- `instructions/azure-devops.instructions.md`: YAML/script/pipeline rules.
- `instructions/code-review.instructions.md`: review severity model.

## Agents

- `agents/data-engineering-architect.agent.md`: planning and design.
- `agents/sql-server-developer.agent.md`: SQL implementation.
- `agents/flyway-migration-agent.agent.md`: Flyway migration work.
- `agents/ssis-orchestration-agent.agent.md`: SSIS work.
- `agents/cicd-reviewer.agent.md`: Azure DevOps review.
- `agents/release-safety-reviewer.agent.md`: release safety.
